name: PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk
summary: PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk operates in the field of hospitality in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Hotel and Property. It operates hotels, condotels, and resorts. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tiara Realty.
